name: Mixed Nut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a large baking sheet or two small baking sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar and brown sugar; beat until well blended. Add eggs; beat well. Sift flour into measuring cup; level off. Stir in flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, and nuts; mix well.
3. Shape dough into 3 rolls, about 7 inches long. Place rolls at least 3 inches apart on prepared sheet(s); flatten each to form a rectangle, about 3/4 inch thick, 3 inches wide, and 7 inches long.
4. Bake at 350°F for 18-25 minutes or until rectangles are lightly golden brown and firm to the touch. Remove from oven; let cool 5 minutes.
5. Transfer rectangles onto wire racks. Cut each rectangle into 1/2 inch slices with a serrated knife. Place cut sides up on sheet(s).
6. Bake at 350°F for 6-8 minutes or until top surface is slightly dry. Turn cookies over and bake an additional 6-8 minutes, or until top surface is slightly dry. Remove from oven; cool completely on wire racks.
7. Store tightly covered.
Serving size: 1 cookie
Calories: 70 (20 from fat)
Total fat: 2g
Cholesterol: 15mg
Sodium: 55mg
